# AT+CSQ response fixtures — signal quality
# Format: +CSQ: <rssi>,<ber>
# rssi: 0–31 (dBm = rssi*2 - 113), 99 = unknown/not detectable
# ber: 0–7 (bit error rate), 99 = unknown

# Good signal (rssi=20 → -73 dBm)
+CSQ: 20,0
OK

# Marginal signal (rssi=10 → -93 dBm)
+CSQ: 10,99
OK

# Very weak signal (rssi=5 → -103 dBm)
+CSQ: 5,99
OK

# No signal / no SIM
+CSQ: 99,99
OK

# Maximum signal (rssi=31 → -51 dBm)
+CSQ: 31,0
OK

# Minimum detectable (rssi=2 → -109 dBm)
+CSQ: 2,99
OK

# Error response (modem not initialised)
+CME ERROR: 10
